## Meeting Purpose

[Review account status, discuss team structure changes, and address operational challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New Managing Director roles being implemented to improve account management and team structure](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Several accounts facing challenges (Metadata, Braida, Tribe) require focused attention and strategy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Process improvements needed for contract management, freelancer oversight, and onboarding new marketing contacts](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Topics

### Team Restructuring

  - [Introducing Managing Director (MD) roles to oversee account pods](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Dave and Jacob identified as initial MDs, with more to be added (potentially Branca)](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [MDs will manage account managers and editors within their pods](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Goal: Improve account oversight and resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

### Account Status Review

  - [Metadata: Slow profit growth, CEO involvement, shifting focus to new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Braida: Likely saved, pivoting towards more programmatic approach](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=2438.0)
  - [Tribe: Potential issues surfacing, need to connect with new head of marketing](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=2454.0)

### Operational Challenges

  - [Contract management: Issues with unsigned contracts and changing terms (e.g., Abnormal)](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Freelancer management: Clarification needed on roles, responsibilities, and oversight](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [Onboarding process for new marketing contacts at client companies needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Pipeline and Pricing Strategy

  - [Considering offering lower-cost "SEO light" package ($6k/month) to price-sensitive prospects](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Need to balance brand reputation, pipeline, and ideal customer profile (ICP) when considering new deals](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=2411.0)

### Learnings from Challenging Accounts

  - [Misalignment on quality expectations and content types can lead to client dissatisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Importance of identifying ideal customer profile (ICP) and establishing non-negotiables](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [Caution needed with highly technical content until processes are refined](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=2384.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to begin transitioning Andre's accounts and ramping up Dave and Jacob in MD roles](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Bridget to discuss new processes with Bruno, including contract management improvements](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [Jimmy to follow up with Jess regarding the true state of the Tribe account](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=2473.0)
  - [Team to develop SOP for onboarding new marketing contacts at existing clients](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Consider implementing a churn review and pipeline review segment in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=3029.0)
  - [Evaluate potential for part-time roles in certain positions, balancing flexibility with team cohesion](https://fathom.video/share/81sbhQDFnfHxrXgk4CwA8R6LmGDaLiWW?tab=summary&timestamp=2850.0)
